K(f)end,function(n)S[n]=S[n]-(-207087-(-207088))if S[n]==750122+-750122 then S[n],T[n]=nil,nil end end,function(n,P)local K=i(P)local Z=function(Z,d,A,q)return E(n,{Z;d,A;q},P,K)end return Z end,function(n,P)local K=i(P)local Z=function(...)return E(n,{...},P,K)end return Z end,function(n)local P,E=486505-486504,n[462033+-462032]while E do S[E],P=S[E]-(-749411+749412),(-875718-(-875719))+P if-259716-(-259716)==S[E]then S[E],T[E]=nil,nil end E=n[P]end end,{}return(c(-647430+10544006,{}))(K(f))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[P(801490+-853801)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
